objectives.text: Being a strategic partner backed by data, driving short term and durable growth (revenue), using proactive adoption of AI capability.

title: Regional Initiative
notes: These KRs balance external client impact (Netmarble, Nexon) with internal team-building and regional influence, reflecting the dual responsibility of a GDS Lead who both serves clients and elevates team capability. Metrics are directional placeholders and should be calibrated against actual Q1 2026 baselines once available.

objectives.text: Establish Korea as a model GDS region by deepening data-driven partnership value with the Sales team for top customer support and scaling replicable analytics frameworks across the long-tail accounts.
key_results: Premium account SoI or SoR increase to be ~10%
Build structured premium account supporting model in close collaboration with PSO and Sales teams by quarterly strategy revisit, initiative setting and action item tracking
Published at least 3 success cases per quarter which can be spreaded across other accounts
Develop a scalable self-serve solution for campaign diagnosis and growth opportunity identification across mid-market accounts
Build clear narratives or product escalations for regional measurement concerns around high CTR or VT

title: Global Initiative
notes: This objective positions Haewon's KOR GDS work not just as local execution but as a strategic global contributor, which aligns with a 'Global Initiative' pillar. The key results balance client impact, platform performance, and organizational knowledge transfer — all realistic given her seniority and existing client relationships, though specific targets should be validated against actual Q1 baselines once data is available.

objectives.text: Successfully build blueprint narrative based on analysis and dashboard in a sharable format with XFn teams
key_results: Build blueprint dashboard with seller-insight view to be broadly used by GM, in collaboration with PM and Global GDS
Expand blueprint best practices into IAA, in collaboration with global IAA working group

objectives.text: Up-level GDS team level AI proficiency to directly create business impact powered by AI
key_results: Develop AI development framework and align within the team.

title: People & Culture
notes: Given no direct Slack/Docs/Jira signals were available, these KRs are grounded in common high-impact People & Culture levers for a senior DS lead managing a regional team: onboarding quality, continuous learning culture, and individual development — all contextualized to KOR GDS and Moloco's gaming client ecosystem. Haewon should adjust headcount assumptions and specific targets based on actual team size and Q1 retrospective data.

objectives.text: Foster a high-performing, collaborative GDS Korea team culture that deepens data science craft, and strengthens cross-functional collaboration to drive client impact at scale.
key_results: Enhance AI proficiency level of the team to be at "Advanced" level - at lease 1 skill contribution, 1 knowledge sharing with APAC team

Conduct structured 1:1 growth conversations with each KOR GDS team member using a defined career development framework, completing 100% of sessions and documenting at least one growth goal per person by June 30, 2026
